channel.title: Wxt on Drupal WxT
channel.description: Recent content in Wxt on Drupal WxT

item.title: Repositories for Drupal WxT
item.description: The following table is a list of all the repositories that are housed under the DrupalWxT organization on GitHub. Name Website Description Size composer-extdeps drupalwxt/composer-extdeps Composer repository for external dependencies on Drupal WxT Size: 23 Bytes docker-scaffold drupalwxt/docker-scaffold Docker Scaffold for Drupal WxT Size: 61 Bytes drupalwxt.github.io drupalwxt/drupalwxt.github.io GH pages for Drupal WxT. Size: 11310 Bytes helm-drupal drupalwxt/helm-drupal Drupal helm chart for Kubernetes.

item.title: Releases
item.description: Important We try our best to have security releases of Drupal Core within 24-72 hours of being made available on drupal.org. The following table is a list of all the releases that are housed under the DrupalWxT organization on GitHub. Release Created Date Description 4.0.0-rc3 2020-12-13T16:39:35Z Features / Updates: Update for Drupal Core Updated Patch for SubProfile Inheritance Update for WxT Additional update path enhancements Resolve issue with Lightning scheduler Updates for WxT Bootstrap Update twig syntax for Drupal 9 support Resolved skip link not accessible on reflow Updates for Lightning Media Improvements to Bulk Upload form Updates for Contrib Updates for CTools Updates for Webform Removed Page Manager patch breaking anonymous users Upgrade path:
